race.description: Tim Mccurdy Mp Member For Ovens Valley Mdn Plate
race.comment: THUNDERBOLT WAY (7) has finished runner up in 3/4 starts this time in, including when in front on straightening was only claimed late last start when second at Pakenham over 2000m. Will be up on speed and very hard to run down. REEL RAIDER (11) is coming along quite well, getting into a narrow fourth at Geelong over 1700m. Up in trip again suits now and she should be hard to run down. TRICKEMEZI (8) maiden galloper in first campaign. Has been out of the money recently including last start when seventh over 2007m at Kilmore two weeks ago, beaten 3.5 lengths. Can sneak into the minors on his home deck. DEADLY DEVIL (1) next best.
